document.masterDocTitle: The Afrotropical species of Habritella Girault & Dodd (Hymenoptera: Pteromalidae)

mods:titleInfo.mods:title: The Afrotropical species of Habritella Girault & Dodd (Hymenoptera: Pteromalidae)

mods:name.mods:affiliation: Alexandru Ioan Cuza’ University of Iași, Faculty of Biology, Bd. Carol I 20 A, 700505 Iași, Romania.

figureCitation.captionText: Fig. 4. Habritella viridifrons sp. nov. A, C–E, G. Holotype, ♀ (RMCA). B, H. Allotype, ♂ (RMCA). F. Paratype, ♀ (RMCA). A. Habitus in lateral view. B. Habitus in lateral view. C. Head in frontal view. D. Detail of mesosoma in dorsal view. E. Metasoma in dorsal view. F. Fore wing in dorsal view. G. Antenna in lateral view. H. Antenna in lateral view.

paragraph.materialsCitation:
Holotype
D.R. CONGO • ♀ ; “Congo Belge, P. N. G., Miss. H. De Saeger, II/hd/9,
24-vi-1952
, H. De Saeger. 3669”; RMCA .

Allotype
D.R. CONGO • ♂ ; same collection data as for holotype; RMCA .

subSubSection.paragraph:
Additional paratypes
D.R. CONGO • 15 ♀♀ , 8 ♂♂ ; same collection data as for holotype; RMCA
.
The specific epithet refers to the specific head colour.

caption.paragraph:
Fig. 4.
Habritella viridifrons
sp. nov. A, C–E, G . Holotype, ♀ (RMCA). B, H . Allotype, ♂ (RMCA). F . Paratype, ♀ (RMCA). A . Habitus in lateral view. B . Habitus in lateral view. C . Head in frontal view. D . Detail of mesosoma in dorsal view. E . Metasoma in dorsal view. F . Fore wing in dorsal view. G . Antenna in lateral view. H . Antenna in lateral view.

subSubSection.paragraph: METASOMA ( Fig. 4E ). With sides almost parallel for about 3/4 of its length, strongly collapsing dorsally. Gt1 slightly produced posteriorly, none of the other gastral tergites enlarged or medially incised. Relative measurements: metasoma L: 133, W: 32; gt1 L: 23, W: 24; gt2 L: 3, W: 25; gt3 L: 20, W: 28; gt4 L: 20, W: 32; gt5 L: 20, W: 32; gt6 L: 20, W: 30; syntergum L: 12, W: 18.

Differs from the female holotype mainly in the following. Body length: 1.9 mm . Metasoma with pale spot in basal half.Antenna 11263. Flagellar setae as in female, i.e., erect, but somewhat denser ( Fig. 4H ). Petiole more visible. Metasoma about equal to head plus mesosoma, posterior end more blunt, distal tergites partly retracted. Metasoma L: 95, W: 38.

Body length: 2.00–2.25. mm. Greenish areas of mesosoma more or less extended. Stigmal height from equal to slightly longer than maximum distance between stigma and PMV. POL 1.3–1.5 × OOL. MV 1.8–2.0 × SV. Metasoma length 4.0–4.2 × width.

Body length: 1.5–2.0 mm. Greenish areas of mesosoma more or less extended. Shape and size of metasoma whitish spot variable. Shape and length of metasoma variable according to degree of collapsation of gastral tergites.
